title: 断航故土
scope: project-level base material boards for faction, region, prop, costume, and location continuity

style_lock.core_sentence: 把全剧低魔冷峻东方史诗的材质语言拆成五个可复用材质世界：昭明旧物、清明院虫蜡白、边墙黑石雪线、金河蒸汽生产、北境骨木皮草。
style_lock.image_family: vertical 9:16 cinematic tactile still-life material boards
continuity_priority: material differentiation must stay stronger than isolated image beauty
current faction emblems are references only and must not be redesigned or overwritten
Zhaoming old objects are advanced, maritime, astronomical, worn, and morally complex
Qingming white is insect-wax institutional violence, not hospital white
Border Wall blackstone and snowline must feel heavy, cold, engineered, and carceral
Jinhe steam production must remain wet, grain-controlled, and non-playful
Northern material language uses bone, wood, fur, rawhide, ash, ochre, and survival fire without metal technology

rules: Use current emblem PNGs only as shape, material, and faction-mark references.
Do not redesign, redraw, replace, or overwrite any faction emblem file.
When emblem language appears inside a material board, it must be partial, cropped, carved, reflected, cracked, sealed, or obstructed as environmental material detail.
Do not reference historical emblem files unless explicitly comparing old versions.

planned_assets.downstream_usage: Zhaoming relics, sun-moon tokens, old relay road props, Southern Old Empire remnants
Qingming Institution interiors, Bai Yi official material system, registries, wax needles, identification rings
Border Wall, Suohou Pass, Hanya Fort, wall soldiers, old engineering scars
Jinhe grain mill district, docks, production machinery, grain control props
Northern beastfolk alliance, Luming line, Minggu Ridge, tribal props, noble fur costume language

image_generation.reason: Prompt plan and output paths are prepared; background image-generation thread has not been launched yet.
